headline: Is Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ADI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Analog Devices, Inc. on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ADI. Analog Devices, Inc.’s share was trading at $375.27 as of April 21st. ADI’s trailing and forward P/E were 68.61 and 32.26 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Analog Devices, Inc. […]
